feed.title: App Store Discounts（TR）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:99063474310237184+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008924688563200+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 1741 201 1540 76
TR 1596 172 1424 62

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(TR)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.
Ranking App Number of Discounts
1 Resident Evil Village for Mac
  • Total Times：2
  • Price：1
  • In-App Purchases
    1. DLC pack：1

entry.title: All In One Memo
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺199,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺199,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

Keep the words, pictures, videos, voice and positions you want to record at any time and anywhere. And there are reminders that you can never forget.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Mayor Card: City Management
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺3,99 → ₺2,99 [₺2,99 ~ ₺9,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺2,99

Application Description

RULE YOUR TOWN, BUILD YOUR CITY, BALANCE YOUR RESOURCES! Swipe each card with one finger, become mayor, make bold decisions, please your people and carve your own reign into history! Mayor Card fuses classic city-management simulation with lightning-fast swipe-card action to create a fresh strategy deck-builder. Drag every card left or right; collect taxes, protect nature, grow population and keep every resource bar alive. Let any gauge hit zero and you’re out of office—maintain the balance, win, and unlock new cards to build an even greater city. KEY FEATURES • 800+ Unique Cards - 800+ unique choices—every decision is yours! • Swipe & Decide – Instant control, deep consequence. • Triple Balance System – People, economy & nature; set tax rates, raise funds, stay green. • Chain Cards – Risk-reward event chains; one move shapes the future. • Adventure Cards – Call-Progress-Outcome stories; every deck hides new town legends. • Character Stories – Treasure Hunter, Chef, Thief… each NPC steers you to a different ending. • Endless Replayability – Random decks, alternate finales: every management term feels new.

entry.title: iGuzheng
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺49,99 → ₺39,99 [₺39,99 ~ ₺49,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺39,99

In-App Purchases

  • iGuzheng™⁺ Pro Version：₺99,99

Application Description

Guzheng is a Chinese plucked zither that has a history dated back to 500 B.C. It is rich in playing techniques. The performer plucks the strings with his right-hand fingernails, while his left-hand fingers apply pressure to the strings to execute vibratos, slides, other embellishments and occasional plucking techniques. iGuzheng supports many playing techniques as an acoustic Guzheng: - Playing techniques for Right Hand: Pluck, Gliss, Tremolo(Shake/摇指) / Automatic Tremolo, Overtone - Playing techniques for Left Hand: Pitch slide, Samll-Vibrato,Big-Vibrato, Tap Pitch (Dian Yin - 点音) Main Features: √ Follow-Play songs, help you to learn and play Guzheng songs easily. √ Flexible Guzheng View, easy scrolling and zooming with drag / pinch gesture on the Pitch Slider Bar. √ High quality stereo samples from Guzheng. √ Full 21 strings. √ Automatically play "Shake" technique (自动摇指) when touches moving on the string horizontally. √ Smart snapping to the correct pitch grid when moving the pitch slider. √ portamento / Vibrato. √ Overtone, use two fingers to tap strings at the same time. √ “Dian Yin” Effect (点音/Tap Pitch), Tapping pitch slider after plucking string to make "Dian Yin" sound effect √ Tuning as Stantard Guzheng tunings.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Boolean!
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺2,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺2,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

It may not disappear when the cubes in real life are intertwined, according to boolean algebra why not. We are trying to reach the geometric shape above by moving the object we want. This minimal puzzle game, only for people who have visual intelligence. Features: -isometric illusion -88 peaceful level -atmospheric and relaxing music -all game developed by one people Follow me: Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/fatihindiegames/ Twitter: https://twitter.com/fatihindiegames

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Resident Evil Village for Mac
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺1.399,00 → ₺349,90 [Free ~ ₺1.399,00]）

All Price Information

Price：₺349,90

In-App Purchases

  • DLC pack：₺389,00
  • All Access Voucher：₺69,99
  • Street Wolf Outfit：₺78,99

Application Description

Experience survival horror like never before in the 8th major installment in the Resident Evil franchise - Resident Evil Village. With detailed graphics, intense first-person action and masterful storytelling, the terror has never felt more realistic. ------------------------------------------------------------ ■In-App Purchases ■Resident Evil Village (Base Game) ・The Trauma Pack DLC ・Samurai Edge - AW Model-01 ・Resident Evil 7 Found Footage Filter ・Resident Evil 7 Tape Recorder Save Point ・Saferoom Music "Go Tell Aunt Rhody" ・Mr. Everywhere Weapon Charm ・Unlock "Village of Shadows" Difficulty ・The Tragedy of Ethan Winters Artwork ・The Baker Incident Report ・Survival Resources Pack ・Mr. Raccoon Weapon Charm ■Winters' Expansion ・Experience brand-new additional content for the award-winning modern horror masterpiece Resident Evil Village: Third Person Mode, The Mercenaries Additional Orders, and Shadows of Rose. ・Street Wolf Outfit ・Street Wolf Outfit for Rose (applies to Shadow of Rose content only) ■Extra Content Shop All Access Vouche ------------------------------------------------------------ ■By purchasing, you will be granted a license to use the product. ■A network connection is required when starting the application. ■About the End User License Agreement ・This End User License Agreement (this “Agreement”) applies to the user’s use of this game software program (the “Program”). ・THIS AGREEMENT SHALL COME INTO EFFECT BETWEEN CAPCOM CO., LTD. AND USER(S) UPON INSTALLATION OF THE PROGRAM BY THE USER. ・Those users between the ages of 13 and 18 (or between 13 and the age of legal majority in your country of residence) or a person with limited capacity shall install the Program only after obtaining approval from its parent or legal guardian who agrees to be bound by these provisions of this Agreement. Please confirm the terms above and agree to this Agreement before purchasing the Program. ------------------------------------------------------------ ■A limited part of the base game can be played for free. In order to play the full game, an in-app purchase is required. ■This game can be played without a controller, however we recommend using a controller as the game has been optimized for controller use. ■This application is approximately 35GB. Important Note: The installation process requires that you have at least twice the size of the application in free storage space available. We recommend downloading the data in an environment with good connectivity. ■Save data upload and download functionality via iCloud Drive has been added. ■Save data cannot be uploaded and downloaded between MacOS and iOS devices. ■Resident Evil Village does not support Universal Purchase. ■Purchase Precautions ・After purchase, returns (including exchange for other products/services) will not be provided for any reason. ・In-app purchases can only be used by the Apple Account that made the purchase and cannot be shared with Family Sharing members. ■Compatible OSs and Devices https://www.capcom-games.com/apple/en-us/ ------------------------------------------------------------ RESIDENT EVIL is a trademark and/or registered trademark of CAPCOM CO., LTD. and/or its subsidiaries in the U.S. and/or other countries.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Resident Evil Village
entry.summary:
Base Game: ₺1.399,00 → ₺349,90
DLC pack: ₺769,00 → ₺389,00
All Access Voucher: ₺174,99 → ₺69,99
Street Wolf Outfit: ₺105,00 → ₺78,99
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Base Game：₺1.399,00 → ₺349,90 [₺329,99 ~ ₺1.399,00]
  • DLC pack：₺769,00 → ₺389,00 [₺209,00 ~ ₺769,00]
  • All Access Voucher：₺174,99 → ₺69,99 [₺39,99 ~ ₺174,99]
  • Street Wolf Outfit：₺105,00 → ₺78,99 [₺45,99 ~ ₺105,00]

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Base Game：₺349,90
  • DLC pack：₺389,00
  • All Access Voucher：₺69,99
  • Street Wolf Outfit：₺78,99

Application Description

Experience survival horror like never before in the 8th major installment in the Resident Evil franchise - Resident Evil Village. With detailed graphics, intense first-person action and masterful storytelling, the terror has never felt more realistic. ------------------------------------------------------------ ■In-App Purchases ■Resident Evil Village (Base Game) ・The Trauma Pack DLC ・Samurai Edge - AW Model-01 ・Resident Evil 7 Found Footage Filter ・Resident Evil 7 Tape Recorder Save Point ・Saferoom Music "Go Tell Aunt Rhody" ・Mr. Everywhere Weapon Charm ・Unlock "Village of Shadows" Difficulty ・The Tragedy of Ethan Winters Artwork ・The Baker Incident Report ・Survival Resources Pack ・Mr. Raccoon Weapon Charm ■Winters' Expansion ・Experience brand-new additional content for the award-winning modern horror masterpiece Resident Evil Village: Third Person Mode, The Mercenaries Additional Orders, and Shadows of Rose. ・Street Wolf Outfit ・Street Wolf Outfit for Rose (applies to Shadow of Rose content only) ■Extra Content Shop All Access Voucher ------------------------------------------------------------ ■By purchasing, you will be granted a license to use the product. ■A network connection is required when starting the application. ■About the End User License Agreement ・This End User License Agreement (this “Agreement”) applies to the user’s use of this game software program (the “Program”). ・THIS AGREEMENT SHALL COME INTO EFFECT BETWEEN CAPCOM CO., LTD. AND USER(S) UPON INSTALLATION OF THE PROGRAM BY THE USER. ・Those users between the ages of 13 and 18 (or between 13 and the age of legal majority in your country of residence) or a person with limited capacity shall install the Program only after obtaining approval from its parent or legal guardian who agrees to be bound by these provisions of this Agreement. Please confirm the terms above and agree to this Agreement before purchasing the Program. ------------------------------------------------------------ ■A limited part of the base game can be played for free. In order to play the full game, an in-app purchase is required. ■Keyboard and mouse are not supported. ■We recommend playing this game with a controller. It can be played on an iPad, but using a controller will provide a better experience. Note: Please check the Apple website for controllers compatible with iPad. Not all controllers will work as intended. ■This application is approximately 16GB. Important Note: The installation process requires that you have at least twice the size of the application in free storage space available. We recommend downloading the data in an environment with good connectivity. ■Estimated download time based on connection speed: 10Mbps - Over 3 hours 100Mbps - 30 to 40 minutes 300Mbps - 8 to 10 minutes ■Save data upload and download functionality via iCloud Drive has been added. ■Save data cannot be uploaded and downloaded between MacOS and iOS devices. ■Resident Evil Village does not support Universal Purchase. ■Purchase Precautions ・After purchase, returns (including exchange for other products/services) will not be provided for any reason. ・In-app purchases can only be used by the Apple Account that made the purchase and cannot be shared with Family Sharing members. ■Compatible OSs and Devices https://www.capcom-games.com/apple/en-us/ ------------------------------------------------------------ RESIDENT EVIL is a trademark and/or registered trademark of CAPCOM CO., LTD. and/or its subsidiaries in the U.S. and/or other countries.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: MEGA MAN X DiVE Offline
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺799,99 → ₺61,99 [₺37,99 ~ ₺799,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺61,99

Application Description

■■ Caution ■■ Please check the "Regarding Purchases" and "Supported Devices" notices below before purchasing or using the app. --- Game Introduction --- Mega Man X DiVE reimagined the world of the Mega Man X series, and now it's getting an offline version! Experience the exciting side-scrolling action we've all come to know and love in a whole new light! Enter Deep Log, a digital world where the game data of the Mega Man X series has been archived. Due to a bug of unknown origins, the game data within Deep Log has become fragmented. With the help of a mysterious navigator, RiCO, the player dives into this digital world to set things straight. Take control of Hunter Programs, recreations of legendary characters such as X and Zero, defeat various forms of Irregular Data, and restore the fractured game data! - Classic Mega Man Action Jump, dash, fire your buster, and swing your saber. All the actions you'd expect from the Mega Man X series are here! In addition, this game features 360 degree aiming and an auto-lock function! You can also scale and position the touchscreen controls to match your own unique playstyle. - Featuring over 100 Characters from the Mega Man Series Acquire your favorite characters from across the Mega Man universe to add to your collection, and level them up to make them stronger! With a mix of brand-new original characters and new designs for fan-favorites, there are plenty out there to discover! - An All-New Original Story with Hundreds of Stages to Enjoy Immerse yourself in a new Mega Man tale that can only be experienced in Mega Man X DiVE. Blast and cut your way through hundreds of stages spanning multiple difficulty levels! - Make Your Characters Stronger with Weapons, Chips, and Cards Characters can equip all types of weapons to become stronger. Upgrade a weapon's rank to increase its power and unlock new skills. Cards featuring classic illustrations also provide boosts, making them fun items to collect as you craft your perfect Hunter Program! 【Regarding Purchases】 Regardless of the reason, we cannot offer refunds (or an exchange for another product or service) once the app is purchased. 【Supported Devices】 Please check the following URL for a list of operating environments (devices/OSs) supported by this app. https://www.capcom-games.com/megaman/xdive-offline/en-us/ Note: Although you can purchase this app using devices and OSs not listed as supported, the app may not function properly. Please be aware that we can neither guarantee the app's performance nor offer refunds if you use a device or OS not supported by the app. 【Enjoy More Capcom Titles!】 Search for "Capcom" in the App Store, or the name of one of our apps, for more fun games to play!

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Ace Attorney Trilogy
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺699,99 → ₺299,99 [₺299,99 ~ ₺699,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺299,99

Application Description

■■ Caution ■■ Please check the "Regarding Purchases" and "Supported Devices" notices below before purchasing or using the app. --- Game Introduction --- Become a lawyer and take the stand to prove your client’s innocence in a court of law! Enjoy rookie attorney Phoenix Wright's first three games in the popular series, all in one package! All 14 thrilling episodes of Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney, Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney – Justice for All, and Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney – Trials and Tribulations are included!F6 With high-resolution graphics, courtroom battles never looked this beautiful! On top of Japanese and English, you can experience the world of Ace Attorney in French, German, Chinese (simplified and traditional), and Korean as well! Just swap to your preferred language in the Options menu! The number of save slots has increased to ten! There are now ten save slots per language available across all three games! 【Game Overview】 There's been a murder! Uncover the truth to save your innocent client! - Investigation Gather information and evidence related to the case! - Courtroom Outwit cunning prosecutors and call out witnesses to discover what really happened by finding inconsistencies in their statements! Solve the intriguing mysteries behind each case and witness the final truth for yourself! Note: During normal conversation, you can fast-forward the dialogue by holding the text skip button. Note: This collection is the same as the one previously released on home gaming platforms. 【Regarding Purchases】 Regardless of the reason, we cannot offer refunds (or an exchange for another product or service) once the app is purchased. 【Supported Devices】 Please check the following URL for a list of operating environments (devices/OSs) supported by this app. https://www.capcom-games.com/product/en-us/aceattorney-trilogy-app/?t=openv Note: Although you can purchase this app using devices and OSs not listed as supported, the app may not function properly. Please be aware that we can neither guarantee the app's performance nor offer refunds if you use a device or OS not supported by the app. 【Enjoy More Capcom Titles!】 Search for "Capcom" in the App Store, or the name of one of our apps, for more fun games to play!

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Street Fighter IV CE
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺129,99 → ₺25,99 [₺19,99 ~ ₺129,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺25,99

Application Description

A new warrior has entered the ring! Take control of 32 world warriors and test your mettle against players from around the world. Street Fighter IV: Champion Edition perfects the winning gameplay formula by offering higher resolution graphics, three new characters (Rose, Juri and Elena) wide screen support for newer iOS devices and a host of updates and refinements. Long time Street Fighter fans can jump into the action and have an instant familiarity with the controls. For more casual players Street Fighter IV features numerous settings and tutorials that put you on the path to victory. • Fight as 32 Street Fighter characters • Higher resolution graphics and wide screen support • Intuitive virtual pad controls allow players to execute full move sets including Unique Attacks, Special Moves, Focus Attacks, Super Combos and Ultra Combos • Take your game to the next level with a MFi controller like the Gamevice (MFi controllers do not work in menus, they fully function in multiplayer and single-player gameplay.) • Battle head-to-head against players from around the world via Wifi • Single player “arcade” and multiplayer modes. • Unleash super moves with a tap of the “SP” button. • Four levels of difficulty. Please check [Supported OS and Devices] in the lower part of HP. https://www.capcom-games.com/product/en-us/streetfighter4-championedition/?t=openv

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

AND USER(S) UPON INSTALLATION OF THE PROGRAM BY THE USER. ・Those users between the ages of 13 and 18 (or between 13 and the age of legal majority in your country of residence) or a person with limited capacity shall install the Program only after obtaining approval from its parent or legal guardian who agrees to be bound by these provisions of this Agreement. In order to play the full game, an in-app purchase is required. ■This game can be played without a controller, however we recommend using a controller as the game has been optimized for controller use. ■This application is approximately 35GB. Important Note: The installation process requires that you have at least twice the size of the application in free storage space available. entry.title: Resident Evil 4
entry.summary:
Base Game: ₺2.599,00 → ₺699,00
Extra DLC Pack: ₺769,00 → ₺579,00
Weapon Upgrade Ticket x5 (A): ₺349,00 → ₺264,99
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Base Game：₺2.599,00 → ₺699,00 [₺429,00 ~ ₺2.599,00]
  • Extra DLC Pack：₺769,00 → ₺579,00 [₺269,00 ~ ₺769,00]
  • Weapon Upgrade Ticket x5 (A)：₺349,00 → ₺264,99 [₺134,99 ~ ₺349,00]

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Base Game：₺699,00
  • Separate Ways：₺349,00
  • Extra DLC Pack：₺579,00
  • Attaché Case: 'Gold'：₺35,99
  • Charm: 'Handgun Ammo'：₺35,99
  • Weapon Upgrade Ticket x5 (A)：₺264,99
  • Weapon Upgrade Ticket x1 (A)：₺105,00
  • Weapon Upgrade Ticket x3 (A)：₺254,99
  • Charm: 'Green Herb'：₺35,99
  • Attaché Case: 'Classic'：₺35,99

Application Description

Survival is just the beginning. Six years have passed since the biological disaster in Raccoon City. Agent Leon S. Kennedy, one of the survivors of the incident, has been sent to rescue the president's kidnapped daughter. He tracks her to a secluded European village, where there is something terribly wrong with the locals. And the curtain rises on this story of daring rescue and grueling horror where life and death, terror and catharsis intersect. Featuring modernized gameplay, a reimagined storyline, and vividly detailed graphics, Resident Evil 4 marks the rebirth of an industry juggernaut. Relive the nightmare that revolutionized survival horror. ------------------------------------------------------------ ■By purchasing, you will be granted a license to use the product. ■A network connection is required when starting the application. ■About the End User License Agreement ・This End User License Agreement (this “Agreement”) applies to the user’s use of this game software program (the “Program”). ・THIS AGREEMENT SHALL COME INTO EFFECT BETWEEN CAPCOM CO., LTD. AND USER(S) UPON INSTALLATION OF THE PROGRAM BY THE USER. ・Those users between the ages of 13 and 18 (or between 13 and the age of legal majority in your country of residence) or a person with limited capacity shall install the Program only after obtaining approval from its parent or legal guardian who agrees to be bound by these provisions of this Agreement. Please confirm the terms above and agree to this Agreement before purchasing the Program. ------------------------------------------------------------ ■A limited part of the base game can be played for free. In order to play the full game, an in-app purchase is required. ■Keyboard and mouse are not supported. ■We recommend playing this game with a controller. It can be played on an iPad, but using a controller will provide a better experience. Note: Please check the Apple website for controllers compatible with iPad. Not all controllers will work as intended. ■This application is approximately 30GB. Important Note: The installation process requires that you have at least twice the size of the application in free storage space available. We recommend downloading the data in an environment with good connectivity. ■Estimated download time based on connection speed: 10Mbps - Over 6 hours 100Mbps - 30 to 40 minutes 300Mbps - 8 to 10 minutes ■Save data can be uploaded and downloaded between MacOS and iOS devices. ■Purchase Precautions ・After purchase, returns (including exchange for other products/services) will not be provided for any reason. ・In-app purchases can only be used by the Apple Account that made the purchase and cannot be shared with Family Sharing members. ■Compatible OSs and Devices https://www.capcom-games.com/apple/en-us/ ------------------------------------------------------------ RESIDENT EVIL is a trademark and/or registered trademark of CAPCOM CO., LTD. and/or its subsidiaries in the U.S. and/or other countries.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Inkblade Idlers: Wuxia RPG
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺49,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺199,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • 1000 Redemption Tickets：₺499,99
  • 80 Redemption Tickets：₺49,99

Application Description

Welcome to "Inkblade Idlers", where the serene beauty of ink-wash painting meets the thrilling world of wuxia martial arts in an idle RPG adventure. Effortless Progression, Deep Strategy Your heroes train and battle automatically, earning silver and experience even when you are offline. Return to spend resources on powerful skills, legendary weapons, and rare manuals to push your team further. Conquer Mighty Bosses, Collect Secret Manuals Face towering martial arts masters in epic showdowns. Each victory unlocks ancient secret manuals that teach your heroes unique and devastating abilities to customize your combat style. Manage Your Martial World Upgrade your shop to increase income, expand your backpack to hold more treasures, and strategically equip your team. Every decision strengthens your path to becoming the ultimate martial arts legend. Key Features: - Breathtaking ink-wash art inspired by traditional Chinese painting - True idle gameplay with progress happening 24/7 - Collect and customize hundreds of weapons, armor, and martial arts manuals - Strategic management of shops, resources, and inventory - Challenging boss fights against powerful martial arts masters Download Inkblade Idlers now and begin your tranquil yet powerful journey to martial arts supremacy. No grinding required.

entry.title: Solar Arc – Sun & Moon Tracker
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺299,99 → ₺249,99 [₺99,99 ~ ₺299,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺249,99

Application Description

Golden hour happens every single day. Most people miss it. Solar Arc makes sure you do not. - Chasing golden hour for a photo? Know the exact minute it starts. - Planning a sunrise hike? See the best trail windows at a glance. - Wondering when the moon rises tonight? It is right there on your screen. SolarArc is a sun and moon tracker that feels like looking out the window. Every view shifts with the real sky — warm when the light is warm, dark when the sky is dark. It is not a data app you check. It is a sky app you feel. ARC MODE The sun and moon traced across your sky in real time. Watch them rise, climb, and fall against a live gradient that shifts with the actual light outside your window. View the sun alone, the moon alone, or both together. GRADIENT MODE Your entire day, painted in one line. Dawn amber bleeds into midday blue, then sunset orange, then deep navy night. Golden hour glows. Blue hour cools. You do not need to read a single number — just look at the color and know where you are in the day. LUNAR TRACKING Know when to look up. SolarArc renders tonight's moon with the correct phase shape on the arc. Plan around full moons. Catch a crescent at dusk. Know exactly how dark the sky will be. 52-WEEK FORECAST What will golden hour look like three Saturdays from now? How much daylight will you have on that hiking trip in April? Pick any date in the next year and see the full picture — sun, moon, and light — before you commit. FIVE WAYS TO USE THE SKY Photography — Golden hour and blue hour, down to the minute. Stop guessing when to shoot. Hiking — Best trail windows and how much daylight is left. Know when to turn around. Screens — A screen curfew that follows the sun. Wind down with the sky, not against it. Gardening — When to water, when to protect, and how many sun hours your plants get today. Stargazing — When true darkness begins. The best window to see everything above you. FEATURES - Live gradient line and arc visualizations - Sun view, moon view, or dual view - Golden hour and blue hour timing - Moonrise, moonset, phase, and illumination - 52-week forecast for any date - Five activity modes - Medium and large home screen widgets - Notifications for sunrise, sunset, and golden hour - Multi-location with automatic timezone handling - Built on NOAA solar and Meeus lunar algorithms - Fully offline. No tracking. No account required. WHAT IS GOLDEN HOUR? Golden hour is the short window after sunrise and before sunset when the light turns soft, warm, and directional. Photographers chase it. Hikers love it. Solar Arc tells you exactly when it happens, wherever you are. -- One purchase. No subscription. No ads. Yours forever. Questions or ideas? hello@spruzzolabs.com

entry.title: Cluedo
entry.summary:
Whispering Pines Bundle: ₺699,99 → ₺249,99
Black Adder Resort Bundle: ₺699,99 → ₺249,99
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Whispering Pines Bundle：₺699,99 → ₺249,99 [₺249,99 ~ ₺699,99]
  • Black Adder Resort Bundle：₺699,99 → ₺249,99 [₺249,99 ~ ₺699,99]

All Price Information

Price：₺34,99

In-App Purchases

  • Welcome Offer：₺999,99
  • Legacy Suspect Pack：₺799,99
  • Suspects Bundle：₺1.499,99
  • Ultimate Edition：₺1.999,99
  • PolarStation Crime SceneBundle：₺249,99
  • Whispering Pines Bundle：₺249,99
  • Black Adder Resort Bundle：₺249,99
  • Epic Crime Collection content：₺999,99
  • Noir Character Pack：₺399,99
  • Noir Crime Scene Plum：₺99,99

Application Description

Join fellow detectives all over the world in the official digital board game version of Clue/Cluedo! Gather crucial evidence, interrogate suspects and solve the original murder mystery. Follow Miss Scarlett, Colonel Mustard, Professor Plum, Chef White, Solicitor Peacock and Mayor Green through the iconic Tudor Mansion, unlocking their motives and alibis as you go. Enjoy Clue/Cluedo the way you remember it in Classic Mode, or jump in for a quick game with Clue Cards mode. Alternatively, if you want to really test your sleuthing skills, try a new investigation format available exclusively to Clue/Cluedo – Ultimate Detective. In Ultimate Detective Mode, everyone answers suggestions at the same time…but secretly! Face your suspects in a direct interrogation as you rely on your skills of deduction to get to the truth. Experience the mystery, solve the murder and become a top-tier detective! HOW TO PLAY CLUE/CLUEDO: 1. Three cards are dealt face-down and set aside – this is the solution to the crime! 2. Everyone is dealt three Clue Cards. These are automatically crossed off your clue sheet, as they can’t be part of the solution. 3. Roll the dice and move around the board. 4. When you enter a room, you can make a suggestion – select who you think the murderer is, what weapon they used and where the crime happened. 5. Other players will then aim to disprove your suggestion; if one of your suggestions matches a card in their hand, they show you that card to disprove it. 6. Use your clue sheet to keep track of which characters, weapons and rooms have been disproven. 7. Think you’ve figured it out? It’s time to make an accusation! Be careful though – if you’re right, you win, but if you are wrong, you’re out! FEATURES - THE CLASSIC TUDOR MANSION – Play the beloved original board game, now rendered in stunning 3D animation and entirely ad-free! - A BRAND-NEW GAME MODE – Exclusive to the digital version of Clue/Cluedo, Ultimate Detective Mode lets you interrogate multiple characters at once. - MULTIPLE MODES – Compete against cutting-edge AI opponents that adapt to your skill level for the perfect game, or challenge detectives around the world. - ADDITIONAL ORIGINAL CONTENT – What happened after the shocking events of Tudor Mansion? Find out in a series of original new crime scenes designed specifically for the digital version of Clue/Cluedo! New characters emerge, bringing with them new clues, motives and case files to consider as you travel around the world in search of the truth. Sharpen your mind with the iconic murder-mystery board game, now available on mobile!

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Otter - Food & Meal Diary
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺99,99 → ₺49,99 [₺39,99 ~ ₺99,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺49,99

Application Description

Otter is a simple and beautiful food diary app that helps you track what you eat every day. No calorie counting, no complicated databases – just take photos, add notes, and reflect on your eating habits. ◆ WHY OTTER? - Clean, minimal design with an adorable otter character - Photo-based meal tracking – snap and save - No ads, no distractions - iCloud sync across all your devices ◆ FEATURES - Photo Food Journal Capture your meals with photos. A picture is worth a thousand calories – see what you eat at a glance. - Daily Notes Write about your day, how you felt, or what made each meal special. - Water Tracker Stay hydrated! Track your daily water intake with simple tap controls. - Weight Log Monitor your weight trends over time with easy-to-read records. - Timeline View Browse your food history in a beautiful timeline. See patterns in your eating habits. - Search & Stats Find past meals quickly and view your eating statistics. - iCloud Sync Your food diary stays safe and syncs automatically across iPhone, iPad, and Mac. ◆ A MINDFUL APPROACH TO EATING Otter doesn't judge. There's no calorie counting or strict diet plans. Just a gentle companion to help you become more aware of what you eat. You are what you eat – let Otter help you remember it. Questions? Contact us at OtterDietDiary@gmail.com

Application Screenshot

iPhone
